CustomField.formula: IF( AND( ISBLANK(Title), Contains(Current_Registration_Type__c, "Digital Marketing") ), 'DMI Nurture Flow', IF( Contains(Current_Registration_Type__c, "Sales"), 'Sales Nurture Flow', IF( AND( Contains(Current_Registration_Type__c, "Digital Marketing"), Contains(":finance director:finance manager:investor:portfolio manager:portfolio analyst:investment analyst:investment associate:investment manager:trader:general partner (gp):managing partner:venture partner:principle (investment fund):",":"&Lower(Title)&":") ), 'Investors Nurture Flow', IF( and( Contains(Current_Registration_Type__c, "Digital Marketing"), Contains(":analyst:budget analyst:business analyst:business systems analyst:data analyst:financial analyst:marketing operations analyst:marketing research analyst:operations analyst:product analyst:title analyst:director of corporate development:vice president (vp) of corporate development:director of ecommerce:vice president (vp) of ecommerce:chief brand officer (cbo):chief business officer (cbo):chief corporate development officer (ccdo):chief creative officer (cco):chief customer officer (cco):chief data officer (cdo):chief digital officer (cdo):chief executive officer (ceo):chief financial officer (cfo):chief growth officer (cgo):chief information officer (cio):chief insights officer (cio):chief marketing officer (cmo):chief operating officer (coo):chief product officer (cpo):chief sales officer (cso):chief strategy officer (cso):chief technology officer (cto):head of marketing:marketing executive:senior vice president (svp) of marketing:senior vice president (svp) of product marketing:vice president (vp) of marketing:vice president (vp) of product marketing:business head:business owner:co-founder/founder:digital transformation:financial planner:research assistant:researcher:senior vice president (svp) of insights:senior vice president (svp) of technology:vice president (vp) of digital:vice president (vp) of insights:vice president (vp) of technology:vice president (vp) of insights:senior vice president (svp) of product management:vice president (vp) of product management:senior vice president (svp) of business development:senior vice president (svp) of sales:vice president (vp) of business development:vice president (vp) of sales:brand strategist:director of consumer market insights (cmi):director of insights:director of strategy:market development manager:market researcher:strategy manager:vice president (vp) of consumer market insights (cmi):vice president (vp) of strategy:", ":"&Lower(Title)&":") ), 'MR Nurture Flow', IF( Contains(Current_Registration_Type__c, "Digital Marketing"), 'DMI Nurture Flow', '' ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Job Titles Persona
